prestazioni: AM28 4.7L V8 (AM08/10470) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GT3582R turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring Akrapović titanium headers and a 300-cell catalytic converter delete for optimized spool and 650+ WHP potential on E85 fuel

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion with bespoke calibration by Dynojet UK, integrating Bosch Motorsport 0261S02010 injectors, Pierburg CWA50 high-pressure fuel pump, and a custom intercooler setup with a PWR 4.5L bar-and-plate core and CNC-machined billet end tanks for sustained power under 25+ psi boost

Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with AST spherical top mounts, custom valving for the Vantage’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part #SPF1005K) to eliminate compliance in the rear subframe, paired with AP Racing CP8650-2600 front brake calipers and 380mm two-piece rotors for track-ready stopping power
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber widebody conversion kit (part #RML-VANTAGE-V8S-WB) with integrated GT3-style dive planes, custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser, and a functional front splitter with 30mm adjustable aero balance via carbon fiber gurney flaps

BBS FI-R 10.5x20" (front) and 12x20" (rear) forged wheels in a custom satin bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 ZR20 front, 325/25 ZR20 rear) with a 5mm spacer setup to achieve a 25mm front and 35mm rear track increase for improved turn-in response

Full interior retrim by Trimworks UK featuring a bespoke Alcantara headliner, carbon fiber Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (part #SD0395) with integrated fire suppression system and AIM MXS Strada dash display for real-time telemetry
